name: AKTI Spark Frontend Excellence and Operator Experience Ticket Pack v1
phase_boundary: Phase 5C is frontend excellence and operator experience only. No Phase 6 business modules, no CRM technical migration, no fake surfaces, no production auth/deployment/secrets.

ticket_quality_rule.summary: One ticket, one outcome, exact-file planning required, broad globs are inspection hints only, and every ticket must be traceable to the approved Phase 5C seed matrix.
phase_5c_guardrails: No Phase 6 business modules or future modules as active/openable surfaces.
No CRM technical migration and no lead-desk route/file/API/contract/model rename.
No CRM pipeline endpoint, fake CRM pipeline counts, stages, conversion, tasks, revenue, analytics, dashboards, modules, metrics, notifications, or fake data.
No production auth, deployment, secrets, real providers, marketplace, workflow builder, AI assistant, or runtime AI.
Visibility does not equal authority; module visibility must not imply import/export/delete/admin/destructive permissions.

ticket_count_justification: The pack uses the approved 49-entry queue: 42 seed rows are preserved, with focused splits for workspace/mobile shell, navigation, operational overview cards, command/search, notification/status/org interactions, and screenshot/accessibility validations. The split choices avoid combining multiple API/data sources, multiple frontend ownership areas, unrelated validation ladders, or screen/component contract boundaries. No ticket count expansion beyond 49 was needed.
